chunks.text: we sat on the porch of grandmother 's house and talked about the long flow of time.
“ I have lived in this house for sixty years,” grandmother said quietly.
She pointed at the big cherry tree in the garden.
“ This tree has been there for thirty years,” she told us.
I talked about myself a little.
“ I have lived in this town since I was born.
Tom has been my best friend since this spring.
My sister has played the piano since she was small.
My brother has played baseball for three years
and now he is an important member of his team.
